essential_archive_sets.notable_track: Sitting on Top of the World
essential_archive_sets.senior_connection: Jerry learning traditional balladry and folk patterns

essential_archive_sets.vibe: The pinnacle of the Fiddle/Banjo/Bass/Mandolin quartet

essential_archive_sets.senior_appeal: Acoustic storytelling, 'The Thrill is Gone' covers, high-fidelity

manual_review_notes.search_tip_1: Search 'Vassar Clements' for the best Old-Timey/Bluegrass fiddle tapes.
manual_review_notes.search_tip_2: Search 'Jerry Garcia Banjo 1960s' for early field recordings.
manual_review_notes.clogging_metric: Look for shows with 'Orange Blossom Special'—it is the ultimate clogging/fiddle showcase.
